name: Skein
description: ENGINE.1 SKELETON of the Skein action-painting / drip-pour preset (Pollock's poured technique). Establishes the persistent, LOSSLESS canvas-hold accumulation path — the no-decay / identity configuration of the mv_warp brush-on-feedback paradigm (D-135 / D-138), a sibling of Dragon Bloom (D-142). NO mark morphology, audio routing, wetness, palette, or mood yet (Skein.1+); the only paint is a fixed test stamp. `family: painterly` and the real emission routing land at Skein.1+. See docs/presets/SKEIN_DESIGN.md §5.
author: Matt
